gate.validator_exit: nonzero while status is not passed or any defect is not passed

defects.rows_or_count: expanded CSV halo rows using derived stellar mass
defects.scientific_effect: Linear stellar mass was routed through a logarithmic helper path, producing radii of roughly 2.5-3.0 Mpc.
defects.required_repair: Use the redshift-dependent linear-stellar-mass interface and recompute M200c/R200c.

defects.rows_or_count: all rows with WISE-derived stellar masses
defects.scientific_effect: Equation label and rest-frame applicability were wrong; colorless fallback was treated as valid.
defects.required_repair: Use the correct equation label and rest-frame color gate; null invalid values.

defects.rows_or_count: GSC 48/52, ALLWISE 47/52, CatWISE 49/52, unWISE 48/52; all four present for 46/52
defects.scientific_effect: The old report claimed complete cross-catalog coverage and hid missing matches.
defects.required_repair: Record per-catalog match status, query status, and missing data explicitly.

defects.rows_or_count: nearest-match audit disagreed for 10 GSC, 4 CatWISE, and 10 unWISE rows
defects.scientific_effect: Row-zero selection can pick a different source than the nearest source; four GSC differences change morphology code.
defects.required_repair: Sort candidates deterministically by separation and identifier; preserve candidate count and second separation.

defects.affected_formula_or_artifact: Stern et al. (2012) mid-infrared color selection
defects.scientific_effect: Blue color was described as starlight proof, and sources outside the validated depth were treated as passed.
defects.required_repair: Emit Stern selection status only within the published depth and color-validity conditions.

defects.affected_formula_or_artifact: GSC morphology summary and contaminant wording
defects.rows_or_count: summary counts and named starlike/unclassified contaminants
defects.scientific_effect: Morphology evidence was overstated as verdict support and did not reflect nearest-match changes.
defects.required_repair: Report GSC class as catalog evidence only; do not alter census verdicts without adjudication.

defects.rows_or_count: catalog artifact absent or not pinned at validation boundary
defects.scientific_effect: The validation could not be replayed from a checked-in, versioned expanded CSV.
defects.required_repair: Check in the rebuilt CSV with manifest hashes and deterministic offline rebuild command.

defects.rows_or_count: figure input referenced an external unversioned CSV
defects.scientific_effect: Figure 3 could be regenerated from a drifting input and must not be promoted from this validation.
defects.required_repair: Generate and check in the versioned Figure 3 input; block promotion until independent validation and owner visual approval.
